{{#seo:
|title=About DreamFactory - DreamFactory Documentation
|title_mode=replace
|description=DreamFactory is an open-source API generation platform used by enterprises worldwide for governed database access.
|keywords=DreamFactory, about, API platform, open source, enterprise
|canonical=https://wiki.dreamfactory.com/About
|og:title=About DreamFactory
|og:type=website
|og:site_name=DreamFactory Documentation
|og:description=DreamFactory is an open-source API generation platform used by enterprises worldwide for governed database access.
}}
== About DreamFactory ==

'''DreamFactory Software''' is the company behind the DreamFactory platform — an open-source REST API generation and management tool used by enterprises, government agencies, and developers worldwide.

=== What DreamFactory Does ===

DreamFactory automatically generates secure, documented REST APIs from any database. It supports over 20 database types — including MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB, and Snowflake — and provides:

* '''Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)''' — granular permissions per endpoint, per role
* '''API Key Management''' — rate limiting, usage tracking, key rotation
* '''SSO Integration''' — OAuth 2.0, SAML 2.0, LDAP, Active Directory, Okta, Azure AD
* '''Live OpenAPI Documentation''' — auto-generated Swagger specs for every service
* '''MCP Server''' — Model Context Protocol support for AI assistants and LLMs
* '''On-Premises Deployment''' — air-gapped, self-hosted, fully governed

=== Deployment Options ===

DreamFactory is available as:
* Open-source (Apache 2.0 license) on [https://github.com/dreamfactorysoftware/dreamfactory GitHub]
* Commercial editions with enterprise support, advanced security features, and dedicated infrastructure

=== Contact ===

* '''Website:''' [https://www.dreamfactory.com dreamfactory.com]
* '''GitHub:''' [https://github.com/dreamfactorysoftware github.com/dreamfactorysoftware]
* '''Documentation:''' You're reading it

=== About This Wiki ===

This documentation is maintained by the DreamFactory team and community contributors. Content is version-controlled on [https://github.com/dreamfactorysoftware/df-wiki GitHub] and automatically deployed to this wiki.

[[Category:DreamFactory]]
